title: duranta canescens
intro: Duranta canescens, also known as sky flower or golden dewdrop, is a flowering plant species in the family Verbenaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Duranta canescens include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. Duranta canescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to make herbal remedies for various health concerns.
